GO
-- Anomalies d'intégrité détectées (exposées au Back-Office via Denodo).
IF OBJECT_ID(N'integrite.CBP_AnomalyTransaction_FACT', N'U') IS NULL
BEGIN
    CREATE TABLE integrite.CBP_AnomalyTransaction_FACT
    (
        Id                    uniqueidentifier NOT NULL CONSTRAINT PK_CBP_AnomalyTransaction_FACT PRIMARY KEY,
        DateCreationErreur    datetimeoffset   NOT NULL,
        IdCBPTransaction      nvarchar(100)    NULL,
        IdFxSentryTransaction nvarchar(100)    NULL,
        CodeErreur            int              NOT NULL,  -- 1 = CBP absente FX, 2 = FX absente CBP, 3 = champs différents
        DescriptionErreur     nvarchar(500)    NOT NULL,
        ChampsErreurs         nvarchar(max)    NULL       -- liste JSON des champs en écart (code 3)
    );

    CREATE INDEX IX_CBP_AnomalyTransaction_FACT_DateCreationErreur ON integrite.CBP_AnomalyTransaction_FACT (DateCreationErreur);
    CREATE INDEX IX_CBP_AnomalyTransaction_FACT_CodeErreur         ON integrite.CBP_AnomalyTransaction_FACT (CodeErreur);
    CREATE INDEX IX_CBP_AnomalyTransaction_FACT_IdCBPTransaction   ON integrite.CBP_AnomalyTransaction_FACT (IdCBPTransaction);
END
GO

-- Trace d'exécution des runs (audit + supervision Control-M).
IF OBJECT_ID(N'integrite.CBP_VerificationRun_FACT', N'U') IS NULL
BEGIN
    CREATE TABLE integrite.CBP_VerificationRun_FACT
    (
        Id                  uniqueidentifier NOT NULL CONSTRAINT PK_CBP_VerificationRun_FACT PRIMARY KEY,
        BusinessDate        date             NOT NULL,
        Status              nvarchar(20)     NOT NULL,  -- Running / Completed / Failed
        StartedAt           datetimeoffset   NOT NULL,
        CompletedAt         datetimeoffset   NULL,
        CbpTransactionCount int              NOT NULL,
        FxTransactionCount  int              NOT NULL,
        AnomalyCount        int              NOT NULL,
        FailureReason       nvarchar(1000)   NULL
    );

    CREATE INDEX IX_CBP_VerificationRun_FACT_BusinessDate ON integrite.CBP_VerificationRun_FACT (BusinessDate);
END
GO


go
SET NOCOUNT ON;
SET XACT_ABORT ON;

BEGIN TRANSACTION;

-- --- Purge des lignes de test (préfixes GUID dédiés ; CAST→LIKE, collation CI) ---
DELETE FROM integrite.CBP_AnomalyTransaction_FACT WHERE CAST(Id AS char(36)) LIKE 'B0000000-0000-0000-0000-%';
DELETE FROM integrite.CBP_VerificationRun_FACT    WHERE CAST(Id AS char(36)) LIKE 'A0000000-0000-0000-0000-%';

-- --- Runs de vérification (12) ----------------------------------------------
INSERT INTO integrite.CBP_VerificationRun_FACT
    (Id, BusinessDate, Status, StartedAt, CompletedAt, CbpTransactionCount, FxTransactionCount, AnomalyCount, FailureReason)
VALUES
    -- Terminés SANS anomalie (cas nominal).
    ('A0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001', '2026-06-01', 'Completed', '2026-06-01T22:00:00+02:00', '2026-06-01T22:01:45+02:00', 1102, 1102, 0, NULL),
    ('A0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000004', '2026-06-04', 'Completed', '2026-06-04T22:00:00+02:00', '2026-06-04T22:01:30+02:00', 1203, 1203, 0, NULL),
    ('A0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000007', '2026-06-09', 'Completed', '2026-06-09T22:00:00+02:00', '2026-06-09T22:01:20+02:00', 1011, 1011, 0, NULL),
    ('A0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000009', '2026-06-11', 'Completed', '2026-06-11T22:00:00+02:00', '2026-06-11T22:01:55+02:00', 1255, 1255, 0, NULL),

    -- Terminés AVEC anomalies (AnomalyCount = nb d'anomalies du même jour, cf. plus bas).
    ('A0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002', '2026-06-02', 'Completed', '2026-06-02T22:00:00+02:00', '2026-06-02T22:01:40+02:00', 1156, 1155, 2, NULL),
    ('A0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000005', '2026-06-05', 'Completed', '2026-06-05T22:00:00+02:00', '2026-06-05T22:02:10+02:00', 1340, 1338, 5, NULL),
    ('A0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000006', '2026-06-08', 'Completed', '2026-06-08T22:00:00+02:00', '2026-06-08T22:01:15+02:00', 980,  981,  1, NULL),
    ('A0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000010', '2026-06-12', 'Completed', '2026-06-12T22:00:00+02:00', '2026-06-12T22:02:05+02:00', 1290, 1289, 4, NULL),
    ('A0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000011', '2026-06-15', 'Completed', '2026-06-15T22:00:00+02:00', '2026-06-15T22:02:30+02:00', 1250, 1249, 3, NULL),

    -- En ÉCHEC (motifs variés) — FailureReason renseigné.
    ('A0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000003', '2026-06-03', 'Failed', '2026-06-03T22:00:00+02:00', '2026-06-03T22:00:08+02:00', 0, 0, 0, 'API CBP indisponible (HTTP 503).'),
    ('A0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000008', '2026-06-10', 'Failed', '2026-06-10T22:00:00+02:00', '2026-06-10T22:00:05+02:00', 0, 0, 0, 'Base FXSentry inaccessible.'),

    -- EN COURS (CompletedAt NULL) — exerce le chemin « run non clôturé ».
    ('A0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000012', '2026-06-16', 'Running', '2026-06-16T22:00:00+02:00', NULL, 0, 0, 0, NULL);

-- --- Anomalies (15) : réparties pour réconcilier les AnomalyCount ci-dessus ---
INSERT INTO integrite.CBP_AnomalyTransaction_FACT
    (Id, DateCreationErreur, IdCBPTransaction, IdFxSentryTransaction, CodeErreur, DescriptionErreur, ChampsErreurs)
VALUES
    -- 2026-06-02 → run ...002 (2 anomalies)
    ('B0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001', '2026-06-02T22:01:00+02:00', 'CBP-0201', NULL,      1, 'Transaction CBP absente de FXSentry.',  NULL),
    ('B0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002', '2026-06-02T22:01:05+02:00', 'CBP-0202', 'FX-0202', 3, 'Écart(s) détecté(s) sur 1 champ(s).',    '["comment"]'),

    -- 2026-06-05 → run ...005 (5 anomalies)
    ('B0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000003', '2026-06-05T22:01:00+02:00', 'CBP-0501', NULL,      1, 'Transaction CBP absente de FXSentry.',  NULL),
    ('B0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000004', '2026-06-05T22:01:02+02:00', NULL,       'FX-0502', 2, 'Transaction FXSentry absente de CBP.',  NULL),
    ('B0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000005', '2026-06-05T22:01:04+02:00', 'CBP-0503', 'FX-0503', 3, 'Écart(s) détecté(s) sur 2 champ(s).',    '["status","valueDate"]'),
    ('B0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000006', '2026-06-05T22:01:06+02:00', 'CBP-0504', 'FX-0504', 3, 'Écart(s) détecté(s) sur 4 champ(s).',    '["tradeRate","salesMargin","farDateDetail.tradeRate","farDateDetail.salesMargin"]'),
    ('B0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000007', '2026-06-05T22:01:08+02:00', 'CBP-0505', 'FX-0505', 3, 'Écart(s) détecté(s) sur 1 champ(s).',    '["currency1Amt"]'),

    -- 2026-06-08 → run ...006 (1 anomalie)
    ('B0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000008', '2026-06-08T22:00:50+02:00', NULL,       'FX-0801', 2, 'Transaction FXSentry absente de CBP.',  NULL),

    -- 2026-06-12 → run ...010 (4 anomalies)
    ('B0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000009', '2026-06-12T22:01:00+02:00', 'CBP-1201', NULL,      1, 'Transaction CBP absente de FXSentry.',  NULL),
    ('B0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000010', '2026-06-12T22:01:03+02:00', 'CBP-1202', 'FX-1202', 3, 'Écart(s) détecté(s) sur 3 champ(s).',    '["tradeAction","currency1Amt","currency2Amt"]'),
    ('B0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000011', '2026-06-12T22:01:06+02:00', 'CBP-1203', 'FX-1203', 3, 'Écart(s) détecté(s) sur 1 champ(s).',    '["tradeDate"]'),
    ('B0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000012', '2026-06-12T22:01:09+02:00', NULL,       'FX-1204', 2, 'Transaction FXSentry absente de CBP.',  NULL),

    -- 2026-06-15 → run ...011 (3 anomalies)
    ('B0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000013', '2026-06-15T22:02:00+02:00', 'CBP-1001', NULL,      1, 'Transaction CBP absente de FXSentry.',  NULL),
    ('B0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000014', '2026-06-15T22:02:10+02:00', NULL,       'FX-2002', 2, 'Transaction FXSentry absente de CBP.',  NULL),
    ('B0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000015', '2026-06-15T22:02:20+02:00', 'CBP-1003', 'FX-3003', 3, 'Écart(s) détecté(s) sur 3 champ(s).',    '["status","tradeRate","farDateDetail.salesMargin"]');

COMMIT TRANSACTION;

PRINT 'Seed integrite.* : 12 run(s) + 15 anomalie(s) insérés.';
GO
